title: nervilia gracilis
intro: Nervilia gracilis, also known as the Graceful Fairy Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Nervilia gracilis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in reducing pain and preventing infection. Nervilia gracilis can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
